LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ERIN MCNICHOL'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-15-544930 WITH CASE NO. CGC-15-544897 IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO CONSOLIDATION AND NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CASE NUMBER 544897 IS THE LEAD CASE AND HENCEFORTH ALL PAPERS WILL BE FILED IN THAT CASE ONLY. ORDER SIGNED. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544930 WITH CASE CGC-15-544897
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIN MCNICHOL'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-15-544930 WITH CASE NO. CGC-15-544897 is granted. The parties stipulated to consolidation and no opposition has been filed. Case number 544897 is the lead case and henceforth all papers will be filed in that case only. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)
